┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    GitHub Actions: Label ↔ Project Sync                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 1: Instant Label → Project Sync                               │
│  File: sync-label-to-project.yml                                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    User Action: Add/Remove status:* label
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ GitHub Event:    │  Trigger: issues.labeled / issues.unlabeled
    │ "issues"         │
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Validate Label   │  Check if label starts with "status:"
    │                  │  → status:development ✅
    └──────────────────┘  → priority:high ❌ (skip)
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Find Issue in    │  GraphQL Query:
    │ Project #9       │  - Get issue's projectItems
    └──────────────────┘  - Filter to project #9
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Map Label to     │  status:backlog → 8b99bfa8 (Backlog)
    │ Status Option ID │  status:development → 47fc9ee4 (Development)
    └──────────────────┘  status:review → c5e8bce6 (Review)
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Update Project   │  GraphQL Mutation:
    │ Status Field     │  updateProjectV2ItemFieldValue
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ✅ Project board updates in <30 seconds


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 2: Scheduled Project → Label Sync                             │
│  File: sync-project-to-label.yml                                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Scheduled: Every 15 minutes (cron: */15 * * * *)
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Fetch All Items  │  GraphQL Query:
    │ from Project #9  │  - Get all items
    └──────────────────┘  - Include Status field & labels
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ For Each Issue:  │  Loop through all project items
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
    │ 1. Get Status field: "Development"   │
    │ 2. Get current labels: status:backlog│
    │ 3. Compare:                          │
    │    Expected: status:development      │
    │    Current:  status:backlog          │
    │    → Mismatch! ⚠️                    │
    └──────────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Remove Old Label │  REST API DELETE:
    │ status:backlog   │  /repos/.../issues/4/labels/status:backlog
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Add New Label    │  REST API POST:
    │ status:development│ /repos/.../issues/4/labels
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ✅ Labels sync within 15 minutes


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 3: Manual Full Sync (with Dry-Run)                            │
│  File: manual-sync-all.yml                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Trigger: Manual (workflow_dispatch)
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Input Parameters:                │
    │ - dry_run: true/false            │
    │ - direction: both/labels/project │
    └──────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Fetch All Items  │  Same as Workflow 2
    │ from Project #9  │
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ╔══════════════════════════════════╗
    ║  PHASE 1: Project → Labels       ║
    ╚══════════════════════════════════╝
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────┐
    │ For each mismatch:               │
    │ - Log planned change             │
    │ - If dry_run=false: Apply change │
    │ - If dry_run=true: Skip & log    │
    └──────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ╔══════════════════════════════════╗
    ║  PHASE 2: Labels → Project       ║
    ╚══════════════════════════════════╝
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────┐
    │ For each mismatch:               │
    │ - Log planned change             │
    │ - If dry_run=false: Apply change │
    │ - If dry_run=true: Skip & log    │
    └──────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Summary Report:                  │
    │ - Items processed: 3             │
    │ - Changes made/planned: 1        │
    │ - Already in sync: 2             │
    └──────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ✅ Complete


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STATUS MAPPING                                                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Label               Project Status      Option ID
    ─────────────────   ────────────────    ──────────
    status:backlog   ↔  Backlog            8b99bfa8
    status:ready     ↔  Ready              f75ad846
    status:development↔ Development        47fc9ee4
    status:review    ↔  Review             c5e8bce6
    status:qa        ↔  QA                 33f744ff
    status:defect    ↔  Defect             9b5ee227
    status:done      ↔  Done               98236657


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  EXAMPLE USAGE SCENARIOS                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Scenario 1: Developer adds label ────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                         │
│  1. Developer adds "status:development" to issue #4                   │
│  2. Workflow 1 triggers instantly                                     │
│  3. Issue moves to "Development" column in Project #9                 │
│  4. Time: < 30 seconds                                                │
│                                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Scenario 2: PM drags card on board ──────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                         │
│  1. PM drags issue #4 from "Backlog" to "Review" on project board     │
│  2. Workflow 2 runs on next schedule (up to 15 min)                   │
│  3. Label "status:backlog" removed, "status:review" added             │
│  4. Time: < 15 minutes (or instant with manual trigger)               │
│                                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Scenario 3: Initial setup / fixing inconsistencies ───────────────────┐
│                                                                         │
│  1. Run "Manual Full Sync" with dry_run=true                          │
│  2. Review logs to see what would change                              │
│  3. Run again with dry_run=false, direction=both                      │
│  4. All issues now have correct labels matching project status        │
│                                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  REQUIRED PERMISSIONS                                                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Repository Settings → Actions → General → Workflow permissions:
    
    ☑ Read and write permissions  ← MUST BE ENABLED
    ☐ Read repository contents and packages permissions only
    
    ☑ Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests (optional)


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  TESTING CHECKLIST                                                       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    After pushing workflows:
    
    ☐ Test 1: Add status:development to issue → Check project column
    ☐ Test 2: Drag issue on board → Wait 15 min → Check labels
    ☐ Test 3: Run manual sync (dry_run=true) → Review logs
    ☐ Test 4: Run manual sync (dry_run=false) → Verify changes
    ☐ Test 5: Check Actions logs for errors/warnings
